NAVAREA XIX 44/17
NAVAL SURFACE, SUBURFACE AND AIR  UNITS WILL BE CONDUCTING A NAVAL EXERCISE 080000 UTC MAY TO 270000 UTC MAY
THE EXERCISE WILL BE HELD IN FOLLOWING AREA:
A.72-00.0N 007-00.0E
B.72-00.0N 022-00.0E
C.70-10.0N 022-00.0E
D.68-50.0N 018-30.0E
E.67-00.0N 014-30.0E
F.67-00.0N 007-00.0E
UNITS CONDUCTING UNDERWATER ACTIVITIES WITHIN THE AREA ARE REQUESTED TO MAKE CONTACT
 WITH THE NORWEGIAN JOINT HEADQUARTER ON TEL:+47 75536298 OR E-MAIL: CSC@COSS.MIL.NO
